output.setting: A decaying, abandoned apothecary overrun by mutated plant life.

pickup.name: Refined Phosphorus
pickup.effect: Ignites objects on contact

encounters.hazard: Toxic pollen clouds that drain health over time
encounters.trigger: Killing the corpse releases a pheromone that unlocks the laboratory door.

pickup.name: Mercury Solution
pickup.effect: Extremely cold substance that freezes organic tissue

encounters.hazard: Slippery wet floors that reduce movement speed
encounters.trigger: Burning the abomination exposes a key hidden in its vine core.

pickup.name: Bottled Banshee Scream
pickup.effect: A sonic weapon that shatters crystalline structures

encounters.hazard: Steam vents that deal intermittent fire damage
encounters.trigger: Freezing the golem causes it to shatter, revealing the path to the main ritual chamber.

boss.name: The Alchemist's Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the boss's containment orb with the sonic weapon before draining its health.

output.objective: Escape the apothecary and cleanse the corruption before the ritual completes.

output.setting: An abandoned, suffocating subterranean labyrinth beneath a crumbling cathedral.

enemy.name: Shade of the Unburnt
enemy.weakness: Direct flame damage from Cinder Staff

pickup.name: Frozen Oil Flask
pickup.effect: Coats enemies in a volatile, sticky substance that reacts violently to heat

encounters.hazard: Flickering shadow pillars that reduce visibility to near zero
encounters.trigger: Stepping on a pressure plate opens a heavy iron door to the Crypt

enemy.name: Corpse-Stitched Abomination
enemy.weakness: Frozen Oil Flask followed by Cinder Staff ignition

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard
pickup.effect: Emits a searing light that weakens necro-constructs

encounters.hazard: Rising caustic water levels that drain health over time
encounters.trigger: Destroying the Abomination causes a collapse, creating a path to the Sacrificial Chamber

pickup.name: Sealed Vial of Holy Ash
pickup.effect: Extremely flammable, magical catalyst

encounters.hazard: Cursed fog that prevents health regeneration
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Zealot unlocks the obsidian seal leading to the High Altar

boss.name: Malakor, The Ash-King
boss.weakness: Coating Malakor in the Sealed Vial of Holy Ash before igniting with the Cinder Staff
boss.victory_condition: Reduce the boss to zero health after the final ritual interruption

output.objective: Purify the desecrated altar by burning the essence of the Ash-King
output.reward: The Eternal Flame Amulet, increasing fire damage output by 50%

pickup.name: Stabilizing Adrenaline Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants immunity to stunning effects and increases attack speed

encounters.hazard: Slick pools of blood that reduce movement speed
encounters.trigger: Stepping into the blood pool alerts the thrall and causes the entrance gate to slam shut, locking the player in

enemy.name: Twisted Overseer
enemy.weakness: Stabilizing Adrenaline Vial (negates his psychic stun blast)

pickup.name: High-Voltage Battery
pickup.effect: Can be used to jump-start heavy machinery

encounters.hazard: Exposed live wires that arc electricity periodically
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Overseer triggers the room's purge cycle, forcing the player to climb the vent shaft leading to the final chamber

enemy.name: Chain-Bound Amalgam
enemy.weakness: High-Voltage Battery (can be jammed into its open wound to overload its nervous system)

pickup.name: Ancient Carving
pickup.effect: Weakens the structural integrity of the boss armor

encounters.hazard: Swinging rusted meat hooks that deal massive physical trauma
encounters.trigger: The Amalgam screams, causing the floor to collapse and dropping the player directly into the boss's inner sanctum

boss.name: The Architect of Agony
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Carving to shatter the Architect's protective shield, then finish with a heavy cleaver strike

output.objective: Escape the slaughterhouse before the meat-press seals the exit permanently
output.reward: The Cleaver of Eternal Hunger (Weapon Upgrade)

encounters.trigger: The Echo dissipates, allowing access to the central chamber where the core pulses

pickup.name: Compressed Steam Valve
pickup.effect: Increases geomancy kinetic force

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Automaton releases pressure, blowing the locked hatch to the Main Boiler Room

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Allows earth manipulation to channel electricity

encounters.trigger: Sentinel collapse shatters the floor, revealing the entrance to the Master Regulator Core

pickup.name: Regulator Key
pickup.effect: The only item capable of unlocking the Brass Overlord's life support

encounters.trigger: Construct destruction triggers the emergency lockdown that calls the Brass Overlord to the arena

boss.name: The Brass Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Regulator Key to disable the Overlord's steam supply while earth-binding its limbs

normalized.objective: Deactivate the subterranean facility's master power source before the atmosphere becomes fully toxic
normalized.reward: The Core Shard: An artifact granting permanent seismic control

pickup.name: Coolant Vial
pickup.effect: Reduces heat buildup

encounters.trigger: Approaching the primary boiler valve triggers the need to clear the garden gate.

pickup.name: Lubricant Oil
pickup.effect: Allows for silent movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Gardener unlocks the main conservatory doors leading to the Arboretum.

pickup.name: Master Gear Key
pickup.effect: Opens the inner Sanctum

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Master Gear Key grants access to the Final Engine Room.

boss.name: Grand Clockmaker Construct
boss.victory_condition: Disable the central gear mechanism using the Master Gear Key

output.objective: Restore the flow of purified steam to the city's heating system by calming the erratic machinery in the Brass Gardens.
